Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Summit Flooring to get the job done right.

“Summit restored the original 1937 oak floors in our German Village home. They replicated missing boards perfectly and used a period-appropriate finish that matches our archways. Six winters later - no gaps or squeaks!”

Megan T. Hardwood Floor Installation
Mar 15, 2025

“Our Dublin basement flooded last spring. Summit installed LVP that looks like real walnut but handles moisture perfectly. The textured surface prevents slips when coming in from the pool area.”

James W. Luxury Vinyl Plank
Jan 22, 2025

“The freeze-thaw rated tile in our Westerville mudroom has survived two polar vortexes without cracking. They matched the original 1920s hex pattern in the adjoining bathroom flawlessly.”

Lisa H. Tile Flooring
Nov 3, 2024

“Summit's pet-proof carpet in our Clintonville living room has endured three dogs and two toddlers. The special padding makes it comfortable for playtime but doesn't show wear patterns.”

David R. Carpet Installation
Sep 18, 2024

“They salvaged our water-damaged 1940s maple floors in Upper Arlington using board replacement instead of a full sand-down. You'd never know there was damage - the grain matching is incredible.”

Sarah K. Floor Refinishing
Aug 5, 2024

“Installed white oak throughout our new Short North condo with special soundproofing underlayment. The wide planks make the space feel larger and haven't budged despite radiator heat fluctuations.”

Thomas B. Hardwood Floor Installation
Jul 21, 2024
Summit Flooring

Trusted flooring professionals serving Columbus, OH and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-flo-r91
